```{r}
#| echo: false
#| output: asis
if (!exists("DATA_THROUGH")) source(here::here("R", "global.R"))
cat(sprintf(paste0(
  '<div class="site-footer">',
  '<span>Data through %s</span>',
  '<span>Sources are noted on each chart</span>',
  '<span>Built by Faelynn Carroll</span>',
  '</div>'), format(DATA_THROUGH, "%B %Y")))
```
